## FacetsMutations.setPreselectedFilters() method

Adds a list of filters to the [preselectedFilters](./x-components.facetsstate.preselectedfilters.md) record.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
setPreselectedFilters(filters: RawFilter[]): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  filters | RawFilter\[\] | The filters to add. |

void
